_description: Rolling history of Claude Schefter's recent posts. Used to prevent repetition and enable callbacks. Scanner appends to this file after each post; oldest entries get pruned to keep the file capped at 30.

entry.subject: short tag — which owner/team/topic was the focus
entry.openerUsed: the opener phrase used (for rotation avoidance)
entry.reframeMode: telemetry — which hostile-tip frame the post used: '' | style-book | intra-division | reverse-lens | rivalry | league-office

posts.body: Morning, league. Hearing the Herd ownership is nervous about branding shifts — worry that a rebrand could stick around longer than intended. New voice on this one. Developing.
posts.subject: web
